title: Live Band
description:
🎉 The ultimate Friday night plan has arrived!

Get down to The Victory Club for a massive night of live tunes, big laughs, and legendary prizes! 🎸

🍻We are kicking things off at 7:00pm and rocking straight through until 11:30pm! We have an incredible Live Band taking the stage to blow the roof off.

But wait, the fun doesn't stop there! During the halftime break, we are turning up the excitement with:🎟️ A high-stakes Raffle🔢 Bingo madness📦 Your chance to win big cash with Open the Box! 💸

After the break between 10pm & 11pm, the stage opens up for an epic Jam Session. Bring your instrument, grab the mic, or just hit the dance floor! 🕺

✨The bar will be fully stocked with a wide selection of refreshments at great value to suit absolutely any taste. Quality options, great tunes, and cash prizes—everything needed for a top night out.

💰 Non-Members: Just £3 on the door!🤝 C.I.U. Members: Welcomed with open arms!

Tag the crew, pack those lucky charms, and start the weekend with a bang! 🔥

title: Outbreak
description:
🎸 🚀 THE BIGGEST SATURDAY NIGHT IN TOWN IS BACK! 🚀

🎸Ditch your usual plans because The Victory Club is the only destination that matters this Saturday, 27th June!

We are turning up the volume for an explosive night of live anthems, high-stakes drama, and pure party vibes.

🥳Brace yourselves as the unstoppable Outbreak take over the stage! They will be delivering a high-energy live performance guaranteed to blow the roof off and keep you moving, so make sure those dancing shoes are ready for action. 🕺💃

🍻 Cheap Drinks, Top Shelf VibesSkip the overpriced pubs and head straight to our bar for a massive selection of drinks at unbeatable prices! Whether you are craving an ice-cold pint, a premium gin and tonic, a smooth glass of wine, or a refreshing soft drink, we are serving up the good stuff without the hefty price tag. 🥂🍺

⏱️ The Countdown to Chaos7:00pm: Doors fly open. Race inside to lock down the best seats! 🏃

💨9:15pm: THE Cut-Off. Ticket sales officially close. Miss it and weep! 🛑11:30pm: Last orders & home time. Time to go recover from an epic night. 🛌

🎟️ Admission BreakdownNon-Members: A pocket-change £3 entry fee. Seriously, that is less than a takeaway coffee! ☕C.I.U. Card Holders: Zero cost! Just flash your card at the door and cruise right on in. 🪪

💰 Halftime Madness: Cash & Prizes Up For Grabs!When the band takes a breather, the real tension begins. We are bringing you three legendary ways to win big:Bingo: Stay sharp, mark your numbers, and prepare to shout the house down! 🎯The Raffle: Packed with awesome prizes. Will this be your lucky streak? 🎁Open The Box: The ultimate test of nerve. Choose the right key, unlock the vault, and smash the jackpot! 🔑

Gather your ultimate squad, get the drinks flowing, and let’s make this Saturday absolute history! Who is stepping up to buy the first round?

title: JEAN PAUL
description:
✨ Saturday Night Live at the Club! ✨Join us this Saturday, 4th July, for a brilliant evening of live music, games, and great company!

🎸 Live Music: The fantastic JEAN PAUL will be performing live!

🕖 Time: Doors open at 7:00pm. Night ends at 11:30pm.

💰 Entry: Just £3 for non-members. C.I.U. members are very welcome!

🎲 Mid-Session Break Fun:

Eyes down for Bingo! Try your luck in our Raffle. Crack the jackpot with Open the Box!

⚠️ Note: Ticket sales close strictly at 9:15pm.

🍻 At the Bar: Enjoy cheap drinks all night long, whatever your chosen tipple!

Bring your friends, support your local club, and let's make it a Saturday night to remember! See you there! 🙌

title: ISLAND BROS
description:
🎉 Saturday Night? Sorted. 🎉Dust off your dancing shoes and get ready for a proper Saturday night out this 11th July! We’ve got your weekend entertainment completely covered.

🎸 On Stage: ISLAND BROS!They’re bringing the tunes, the energy, and the ultimate weekend vibes. You won't want to miss them!

🕖 The Timings: Doors open at 7:00pm and we'll keep the party going until 11:30pm.

💰 The Door: Just £3 for non-members! All C.I.U. members are very welcome as always.

🎲 The Half-Time Madness:We’re cramming maximum fun into the break. Eyes down and wallets out for:

Bingo (Grab your lucky dabber!)

Raffle (You've got to be in it to win it!)

Open the Box (Will you crack the jackpot?)

⚠️ Crucial info: Ticket sales close strictly at 9:15pm. Don't miss out!

🍻 At the Bar: Thirsty? We’ve got seriously cheap drinks flowing all night. Whatever your chosen tipple is, we'll keep your glass full without emptying your wallet! Bring your friends, bring your family, and let's have a laugh. See you at the bar! 🥳

title: BOOZE & BLUES
description:
👋 Your Saturday Night Invitation! 👋 Looking for a friendly night out with great company? Come on over this Saturday 18th July—our doors are open, and everyone is welcome to join the fun!

🎸 On Stage: BOOZE & BLUES! We are thrilled to host this fantastic band. They will be bringing brilliant live music and a wonderful atmosphere to our stage.

🕖 The Timings: Come early to grab a good seat! Doors open at 7:00pm, and we will be laughing and dancing until 11:30pm.

💰 The Door: Only £3 for non-members! To all our regular C.I.U. members, we cannot wait to see you back at the club.

🎲 Our Mid-Session Break: Get involved, have a chat, and try your luck with our friendly community games: Bingo (Get your lucky dabbers ready!) Raffle (With some brilliant prizes up for grabs!) Open the Box (See if you can crack the jackpot!) ⚠️ Quick reminder: Game ticket sales close strictly at 9:15pm so nobody misses out.

🍻 At the Bar: Our lovely bar staff will be serving up your favourite tipple all night. We keep our drink prices nice and cheap so you can enjoy your evening without worrying about the bill!

Whether you are a regular face or visiting us for the very first time, we can't wait to give you a warm welcome. Bring your friends, bring your family, and let's make it a wonderful night together! See you there! ❤️

title: VEGAS & SLIM
description:
👋 Your Perfect Saturday Night Out! 👋 Looking for a warm welcome and a brilliant atmosphere? Come and join our friendly community this Saturday 25th July—we cannot wait to see you! 🎸 On Stage: VEGAS & SLIM! We are absolutely delighted to host this fantastic duo. They will be filling the room with incredible live music and great vibes all evening. 🕖 The Timings: Come on in and grab a good seat! Doors open at 7:00pm, and we will be enjoying the music and laughs until 11:30pm.

💰 The Door: Just £3 for non-members! To all our wonderful C.I.U. members, a huge welcome back as always.

🎲 Our Mid-Session Break: Have a chat, enjoy a drink, and join in on the fun with our friendly club games: Bingo (Get those lucky dabbers ready!) Raffle (With some brilliant prizes to be won!) Open the Box (Will you be the one to crack the jackpot?)

⚠️ Quick reminder: Game ticket sales close strictly at 9:15pm so everyone gets a turn.

🍻 At the Bar: Our lovely bar staff are ready to pour your favourite tipple. We keep all our drink prices nice and cheap, so you can relax and enjoy your night out without breaking the bank! Whether you are a regular regular or walking through our doors for the first time, you are part of the family. Pull up a chair, bring your loved ones, and let's make it a night to remember. See you there! ❤️
